entry.title: IDC W91QUZ07D0009 (P00010) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:whoCanUse: OTHER:ALL FEDERAL AGENCIES MAY PLACE ORDER AGAINST THIS CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
